name: HOGE ExternalProduct-style 1024-point forward NTT oracle
description: Placeholder for a future HOGE forward NTT correctness task. This task should use the original HOGE ExternalProduct final-output boundary instead of the extracted standalone NTTWrap internal wrapper.

reference.input_domain: two 1024-coefficient 64-bit residue vectors accepted by the same final NTT/output path used by HOGE ExternalProduct

observable_contract.scope: extract or wrap the ExternalProduct final-output NTT boundary, not the standalone internal NTTWrap ports
observable_contract.output_capture: for component k, output cycle i, and lane j: circres[k][j * 32 + i] = io_out[j]
observable_contract.comparison: compare circres[k][idx] exactly against restrlwentt[k][idx] produced by TFHEpp::TwistNTT
observable_contract.not_yet_defined: candidate Verilog top, input stimulus protocol, build target, and C++ Verilator harness

implementation_notes: Keep hoge_streaming_ntt_1024_p64 as a tier0 lint/interface task until this oracle exists.
Use this planned task for forward-NTT arithmetic and latency ranking only after the executable harness is added.
The current NTTWrap wrapper exposes 64-bit internal residues and has not been matched to a standalone TFHEpp oracle by simple ordering changes.
